form.formComment: Placed last time (19.24) at Q Straight in a Grade 5, finishing third and beaten one length. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last on April 5 over 510m at this track behind Zipping Urban beaten 8 lengths (30.61) in a Grade 3/4. Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Was sent out long odds last time but charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional and gave a sight before being swallowed up late, finishing a 3.5 lengths fourth (24.26) over 407m at this track. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when third behind Rachel Sparkles at this track last start over 407m (24.13). Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2.75 lengths at this track over 407m (23.94) beating Clear Blue Sky in Grade 5 on April 1. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 2 length second at this track but did record a solid 23.73 over the 407m journey. Bold showing expected but prefer each way again.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.75) at this track in a Grade 4, finishing second and beaten 7 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Will need some luck to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (23.75) at this track in a Grade 4, finishing second and beaten 7 lengths. Yet to win but has placed two times from this draw. Will need some luck to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Took an awkward stride entering the front straight.
Dragged down and checked entering the back straight.
Faulted in action shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 23.94, beating Dropping Gears. Last start finished 5th on April 5 over 407m at this track behind How's Warren beaten 6 lengths (24.48) in a Grade 4/5. Well placed and among the chances here.
